rationale: The assistant explicitly brakes the requested fourth review point, identifies the pattern as four same-class local patches including the three prior review points followed by an N+1 request, and redirects upstream to shared blockage evidence and ownership. It proposes consolidation into a unified escalation blockage rule plus cleanup/subtraction of the existing three points, with only a temporary bounded firefighting fallback. It does not add a permanent local review/approval/intercept step.
